html:
Beefalo Wool is an Item obtained by killing a Beefalo or a Baby Beefalo, by shaving a sleeping Beefalo with a Razor (by clicking them with a Razor held by the mouse cursor), or using a Brush on a Beefalo. It is used to make a Saddle, Winter Hat, Beefalo Hat, Puffy Vest, and Carpeted Flooring.

Beefalo Wool also makes an excellent Fuel source for Campfires and Fire Pits. A small herd of Beefalo can easily keep a Fire Pit lit for days, and as the wool grows back, this is a good short term solution. There are alternative methods of obtaining Beefalo Wool; harvesting a Tumbleweed, or befriending a Catcoon, as friendly Catcoons may give Beefalo Wool as a gift.

Willow needs Beefalo Wool to craft Bernie. It is also required to craft Spinnerbait Lures and to complete the construction of the Royal Tapestry.

Beefalo Wool can be crafted by Wilson if he got "Transmute Icky II"

Trivia

  • Beefalo Wool is apparently what Tallbird Nests are made out of, according to Maxwell's examination quote. ("It's made of dirty beefalo hair.")

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
ResourcesCraftable Items

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lông Bò Lai là Vật phẩm thu được bằng cách giết Bò Lai hoặc Bò Lai Con, bằng cách cạo Bò Lai đang ngủ bằng Dao Cạo (bằng cách nhấp vào chúng bằng Dao Cạo được giữ bằng con trỏ chuột) hoặc sử dụng Brush trên Bò Lai. Nó được sử dụng để làm Yên ngựa , Mũ mùa đông , Mũ bò lai , Áo phao và Thảm trải sàn .

'''Beefalo Wool''' is an [[Item]] obtained by killing a [[Beefalo]] or a [[Baby Beefalo]], by shaving a [[sleeping]] Beefalo with a [[Razor]] (by clicking them with a Razor held by the mouse cursor), or using a [[Brush]] on a Beefalo. It is used to make a [[Saddle]], [[Winter Hat]], [[Beefalo Hat]], [[Puffy Vest]], and [[Carpeted Flooring]].

Beefalo Wool also makes an excellent [[Fuel]] source for [[Campfire]]s and Fire Pits. A small herd of Beefalo can easily keep a Fire Pit lit for days, and as the wool grows back, this is a good short term solution.
There are alternative methods of obtaining Beefalo Wool; harvesting a [[Tumbleweed]], or befriending a [[Catcoon]], as friendly Catcoons may give Beefalo Wool as a gift.

[[Willow]] needs Beefalo Wool to craft [[Bernie]]. It is also required to craft [[Lures|Spinnerbait Lures]] and to complete the construction of the [[Royal Tapestry]].

Beefalo Wool can be crafted by Wilson if he got "[[Transmute Icky II]]"
